# Contributing

Anyone can contribute, just respect the formats asked in [PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md](PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md).

## Add hashes

Hashes can be added to new or existing csv files, these files should be sorted by hash number.

It can be done using the `scripts/format.ps1` script or via the `sort_file` of [ate47/atian-cod-tools](https://github.com/ate47/atian-cod-tools).

## Add other things

To add anything else, descript in the pull request your changes.
